name: CRA INTERNATIONAL, INC.
summary: Unless otherwise indicated or required by the context, when we use the terms "CRA", "the Company," "us," "we," or "our" we mean CRA International,Inc., a Massachusetts corporation, and its consolidated subsidiaries. Company Overview We are a leading global consulting firm specializing in providing economic, financial and management consulting services.
